title: Universal CPG Node (v2)
description: Validates a single node in the export format produced by GraphCollector.export_cpg_v1().

id.description: Unique node identifier in the export. Format: '{project_id}:{internal_key}'.

type.description: Mapped CPG node type — derived from the internal type by export_cpg_v1().

location.description: Source location. Present on nodes that originate from an AST node with byte offsets.

start_offset.description: Byte offset of the node's first character in the source file. Null for synthetic nodes.

end_offset.description: Byte offset one past the node's last character. Null for synthetic nodes.

file.description: Absolute path of the source file this node belongs to.

properties.description: Type-specific metadata. Always contains 'kind' (internal type string) and 'language'.

kind.description: Internal CPG type before export mapping (e.g. 'local_function_definition', 'for_statement'). Mirrors the 'type' field in the internal knowledge graph.

language.description: Source language of this node (always 'lua' for this pipeline).

code.description: Source text of the originating AST node. Empty string for synthetic nodes (directory, metric).

name.description: Symbol name. Present on FUNCTION, VARIABLE, IDENTIFIER, CALL, and index_expression nodes.

field.description: Field name for dot-index expressions (obj.field). Present on IDENTIFIER nodes with kind='index_expression'.

write.description: Set to 'True' on IDENTIFIER nodes that appear on the left-hand side of an assignment statement.

initialized.description: Set to 'True' when a VARIABLE (local_variable_declaration) node has an initializer expression.

is_table.description: Set to 'True' when a VARIABLE node is initialised from a table constructor.

module_path.description: Dotted module path for module_import nodes (e.g. 'math.utils'). Present on VARIABLE nodes with kind='module_import'.

module_name.description: The module's own declared name. Present on NAMESPACE nodes with kind='module'.

table_keys.description: Comma-separated field keys for table_constructor nodes (e.g. 'key1,key2,1,2'). Positional entries use their 1-based numeric index.

value.description: Raw source text of a LITERAL node (number, string, boolean, nil).

halstead_metrics.description: Halstead complexity metrics computed for this node's subtree.

T.description: Estimated implementation time in seconds: E / 18.

loc.description: Lines-of-code breakdown for this node's subtree.

total.description: Total lines including blank and comment lines.

commented.description: Lines that contain only a comment.

comment_pct.description: Ratio of comment lines to total lines (0–1).

cyclomatic_complexity.description: McCabe cyclomatic complexity of this node's subtree. 1 base + 1 per decision point (if, elseif, for, while).

variable_metrics.description: Variable usage counts for FUNCTION nodes.

local_vars_current.description: Local variables declared directly in this function's body.

local_vars_nested.description: Local variables declared in nested scopes within this function.

dependency.description: Inter-function dependency metrics for FUNCTION nodes.

depends_on.description: Node IDs of functions this function calls.

depended_by.description: Node IDs of functions that call this function.

global_var_access.description: Global variable access counts for FUNCTION nodes.

global_vars_read.description: Number of global variable reads inside this function.

global_vars_written.description: Number of global variable writes inside this function.

statement_usage.description: Statement-type frequency counts for FILE/chunk nodes.

total.description: Total function definitions in this file.

info_flow.description: Information-flow interface metrics for FUNCTION nodes.

args_out.description: Number of values in the return statement.

num_files.description: Project-level metric node: total number of FILE nodes in the graph.

num_modules.description: Project-level metric node: total number of NAMESPACE (module) nodes.

avg_functions_per_file.description: Project-level metric node: average number of function definitions per file.

max_functions_in_file.description: Project-level metric node: maximum function count in any single file.

min_functions_in_file.description: Project-level metric node: minimum function count in any single file.

avg_lines_per_function.description: Project-level metric node: average total LOC per function across all files.

avg_comment_pct.description: Project-level metric node: average comment-line ratio across all files.
